title: Hardcoded Secret or Credential
description: A secret, API key, or credential literal appears hardcoded in source code. Hardcoded credentials allow unauthorized access if the code is exposed.

finding.message: Hardcoded secret detected in {{file}} at line {{line}}. Move to a secrets manager.

references: Move secrets to environment variables, a secrets manager (Vault, AWS Secrets Manager), or a CI/CD secrets store.
Rotate any exposed credential immediately and audit access logs.
Use pre-commit hooks or CI scanning (gitleaks, truffleHog) to prevent future secret commits.
